Search Results for

    Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET API Documentation

    Overview

    Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET is a free, open-source spreadsheet library that provides Aspose.Cells-compatible APIs for working with Excel files in .NET applications.

    Key Features

    • Workbook Management: Create, load, modify, and save XLSX workbooks
    • Worksheet Operations: Manage worksheets, cells, and data
    • Styling: Apply rich formatting including fonts, colors, borders, and number formats
    • Formulas: Support for Excel formulas
    • Data Validation: Implement data validation rules
    • Conditional Formatting: Apply conditional formatting rules
    • Page Setup: Configure print settings and page layout
    • Hyperlinks: Manage hyperlinks within worksheets
    • Document Properties: Access and modify workbook metadata

    Quick Start

    using Aspose.Cells_FOSS;

// Create a new workbook
var workbook = new Workbook();

// Access the first worksheet
var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];

// Set cell values
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Name");
worksheet.Cells["B1"].PutValue("Age");
worksheet.Cells["A2"].PutValue("John");
worksheet.Cells["B2"].PutValue(25);

// Apply styling
var style = worksheet.Cells["B2"].GetStyle();
style.Font.Bold = true;
worksheet.Cells["B2"].SetStyle(style);

// Save the workbook
workbook.Save("output.xlsx");
